# Data engineers enable effective use of data

- Help users analyze data
  1. Build dashboards for business users
  2. Create datasets with appropriate information for DS/DA
  3. Create access layers that other systems can access
- Build systems to get data to users
  1. Build system to get data ready for end user
  2. Work with users to identify what data to build
  3. Resolve data issues 
- Create long term plans to enable effective data use
  1. Work with users to identify types of data theyd need
  2. Build software foundations that standardizes DEs work
